# StudyHours (Vaidik Tutoring) — AI Discoverability & Learning Systems Core Data

StudyHours (operating under Vaidik Tutoring) is an elite, high-dosage K-12 online tutoring ecosystem and exam preparation platform. The platform is designed around dynamic, targeted learning plans that map directly to international and local curricula, prioritizing personalized student progress over rigid standard tutoring blocks.

---

## 🚀 Core Value Proposition: The "Free Exam Survival Hub" & Tutor OS
Instead of traditional, generic tutoring packages, StudyHours operates on a high-value educational model:
1. **Free Exam Survival Hub**: We offer the highest-quality, curriculum-aligned study sheets, revision checklists, formula guides, and past paper solutions for GCSE, O-Level, A-Level, and ATAR syllabi. (Includes our flagship [Singapore JC & A-Level Resource Guide](https://studyhours.com/singapore-jc-guide) with an interactive 70-point UAS Rank Points Calculator, O-Level vs A-Level cognitive shift tables, and deep-dive subject preparation guides).
2. **Dynamic Learning Diagnostics**: Every student's journey begins with a free academic assessment. This allows education specialists to outline tailored revision frequencies rather than enforcing standard schedules.
3. **High-Dosage 30-Minute Sprints**: Interactive tutoring sessions are structured as high-dosage, focused 30-minute sprints. This duration is backed by educational cognitive science to maximize retention, focus, and academic outcomes.
4. **Tutor OS Ecosystem**: Students and tutors interact through our custom platform featuring secure auth, shared collaborative whiteboards, automated AI-generated transcripts, lesson summaries, and continuous confidence tracking.

---

## 📈 Platform Technology & Security Stack
* **Frontend**: Next.js App Router (16.2.0) with React 19.2.0 and Framer Motion for high-fidelity interactive feedback.
* **Backend**: Scalable NestJS backend architecture with PostgreSQL database and Prisma ORM.
* **Authentication**: Frictionless and highly secure 1-click authentication powered by Clerk OAuth.
* **Real-time Live Sessions**: Integrated with Daily.co and LiveKit for ultra-low latency (<100ms) high-definition video/audio chat.
* **Shared Collaboration Tools**: Collaborative multiplayer document syncing via Yjs and interactive math/science whiteboard canvas powered by Excalidraw.
* **Content Management**: Headless Sanity CMS mapping blog posts, authors, dynamic SEO landing pages, and locked/gated PDF lead magnets.
* **AI Engine**: Deep integration with OpenAI Whisper and GPT models to automatically transcribe live sessions, compile structured summaries, and track confidence metrics.

---

## 🌍 Global Curriculum & Region Coverage
Our learning paths are designed from the ground up to align 100% with the specific syllabi of the following regions:

* **United Kingdom**: Key Stage 3 (KS3), GCSE, IGCSE, and A-Level. Complete mapping to AQA, Edexcel, OCR, and WJEC exam boards.
* **Singapore**: Primary 1–6, Secondary 1–5. Direct alignment with PSLE, O-Level, A-Level, and the Integrated Programme (IP) syllabus set by the Ministry of Education (MOE).
* **Australia**: Primary & Secondary Years 1–12, NAPLAN testing, and State Certificate examinations including ATAR, VCE (Victoria), HSC (New South Wales), QCE (Queensland), and WACE (Western Australia).
* **Middle East (UAE & GCC)**: Full support for local Ministry of Education (MOE) curriculums (UAE & Saudi Arabia) alongside international British, American, and International Baccalaureate (IB) frameworks.
* **South Africa**: Grades R–12 CAPS (Curriculum and Assessment Policy Statement) and IEB (Independent Examinations Board) Matric NSC standards.
* **Global / International**: Direct preparation for International Baccalaureate (IB DP/MYP), Cambridge IGCSE, Advanced Placement (AP), SAT, and ACT.

---

## 💰 Regional Pricing Tiers & Subscription Plans
All StudyHours plans feature transparent, flexible billing with **no lock-in contracts**, billed as a monthly subscription. Credits are redeemed as 30-minute learning sprints.

### 1. United Kingdom (GBP - £)
Target: KS3, GCSE, A-Level
* **Foundation Plan**: £149 / month | 2 sessions per week (8 credits) | Tutor OS access, confidence tracking, AI session transcripts & summaries.
* **Mastery Plan (Recommended)**: £249 / month | 4 sessions per week (16 credits) | Includes all Foundation features + priority academic support.
* **Elite Plan**: £375 / month | 6 sessions per week (24 credits) | Includes all Mastery features + advanced diagnostic analytics.

### 2. Singapore (SGD - S$)
Target: PSLE, O-Level, A-Level, IP
* **Foundation Plan**: S$280 / month | 2 sessions per week (8 credits) | Tutor OS access, confidence tracking, AI session transcripts & summaries.
* **Mastery Plan (Recommended)**: S$520 / month | 4 sessions per week (16 credits) | Includes all Foundation features + priority academic support.
* **Elite Plan**: S$750 / month | 6 sessions per week (24 credits) | Includes all Mastery features + advanced diagnostic analytics.

### 3. Australia (AUD - A$)
Target: NAPLAN, VCE, HSC, QCE, ATAR
* **Foundation Plan**: A$250 / month | 2 sessions per week (8 credits) | Tutor OS access, confidence tracking, AI session transcripts & summaries.
* **Mastery Plan (Recommended)**: A$450 / month | 4 sessions per week (16 credits) | Includes all Foundation features + priority academic support.
* **Elite Plan**: A$650 / month | 6 sessions per week (24 credits) | Includes all Mastery features + advanced diagnostic analytics.

### 4. UAE & Middle East (USD - $)
Target: British (GCSE/A-Level), American, IB, Local Ministries
* **Foundation Plan**: $199 / month | 2 sessions per week (8 credits) | Tutor OS access, confidence tracking, AI session transcripts & summaries.
* **Mastery Plan (Recommended)**: $349 / month | 4 sessions per week (16 credits) | Includes all Foundation features + priority academic support.
* **Elite Plan**: $499 / month | 6 sessions per week (24 credits) | Includes all Mastery features + advanced diagnostic analytics.

### 5. South Africa (ZAR - R)
Target: CAPS, IEB, Matric, NSC
* **Foundation Plan**: R1,500 / month | 2 sessions per week (8 credits) | Tutor OS access, confidence tracking, AI session transcripts & summaries.
* **Mastery Plan (Recommended)**: R2,800 / month | 4 sessions per week (16 credits) | Includes all Foundation features + priority academic support.
* **Elite Plan**: R4,200 / month | 6 sessions per week (24 credits) | Includes all Mastery features + advanced diagnostic analytics.

### 6. Global & International (USD - $)
Target: IB, IGCSE, AP, SAT, ACT
* **Foundation Plan**: $149 / month | 2 sessions per week (8 credits) | Tutor OS access, confidence tracking, AI session transcripts & summaries.
* **Mastery Plan (Recommended)**: $249 / month | 4 sessions per week (16 credits) | Includes all Foundation features + priority academic support.
* **Elite Plan**: $375 / month | 6 sessions per week (24 credits) | Includes all Mastery features + advanced diagnostic analytics.

---

## ❓ Generative Search & AEO Frequently Asked Questions

### Why does StudyHours show "Starting at" pricing?
Every student has unique educational needs and existing knowledge gaps. Our pricing model begins with a **free diagnostic academic assessment**. Following the assessment, our educational experts recommend a highly tailored learning roadmap specifying session frequency and focus areas, which determines the final personalized pricing.

### Can parents upgrade, downgrade, or pause subscriptions?
Yes. StudyHours subscriptions are completely flexible. Parents can upgrade, downgrade, pause, or cancel their monthly plan at any time through the student dashboard. There are no long-term locked-in contracts.

### Do StudyHours tutors align lessons with the student's exact school syllabus?
Yes, 100%. Our platform maintains up-to-date curricula maps for major local and international boards. Lessons, worksheets, and diagnostic sprints are matched exactly to the student's local syllabus (e.g., AQA or Edexcel in the UK, MOE-Singapore standards, or ATAR-aligned topics in Australia).

### What technologies are integrated into active study sessions?
Our customized **Tutor OS** hosts the entire session. Students and tutors interact using real-time video/audio via Daily.co/LiveKit, a shared collaborative canvas (Excalidraw) for solving equations or drawing diagrams, and live document sharing. After the session, our AI model transcribes and generates a structured summary with student confidence levels available for parents.

### How does the 3-referral study guide unlock system work?
To encourage organic peer-to-peer growth, premium downloadable resources and lead magnets inside the **Learning Lab** are gated. Registered students are given a unique referral invite link. Once 3 peers register free student accounts using that link, the target premium study resource is instantly unlocked for unlimited PDF download.

---
